label: Bullish
explanation: 8/10 is bullish from a 7-day headline keyword scan. Bullish drivers: Dow Jones Futures: What To Do As Market Rally Faces First Real Test; SpaceX IPO, Apple, Oracle Loom; Mythos rejuvenated the cybersecurity sector. Earnings put the recent rally to the test.
